definitions.title: DataWorks branding header
definitions.reason: Keep DataWorks DataAgent branding in the CLI header and startup display.
tests: cd packages/cli && npx vitest run src/ui/components/Header.test.tsx src/ui/components/AppHeader.test.tsx

definitions.title: DataWorks startup tips
definitions.reason: Keep startup tips and beta guidance tailored to DataWorks usage.
tests: cd packages/cli && npx vitest run src/ui/components/Tips.test.ts

definitions.title: DataWorks i18n strings
definitions.reason: Keep DataWorks-specific placeholders and usage examples.

definitions.title: DSW OAuth redirect rewrite
definitions.reason: Rewrite MCP OAuth redirect URLs for the DSW proxy environment.
tests: cd packages/core && npx vitest run src/mcp/constants.test.ts src/mcp/oauth-provider.test.ts

definitions.title: Internal OSC8 terminal links
definitions.reason: Keep terminal hyperlink handling compatible with internal terminal environments.
tests: cd packages/cli && npx vitest run src/ui/utils/osc8.test.ts

definitions.title: DingTalk channel enhancements
definitions.reason: Keep DingTalk channel card, markdown, and message routing behavior.

definitions.title: Feishu channel integration
definitions.reason: Rewrite feishu channel import to fork package name in CLI registry.

definitions.title: Claude WebSearch compatibility
definitions.reason: Keep fork behavior around Claude WebSearch conversion and integration coverage.

definitions.title: Single-file bundle output
definitions.reason: Fork uses single outfile (dist/cli.js) without code-splitting; build.js omits acp-bridge from the explicit build order because the fork relies on cli's tsconfig project references to compile it transitively.

definitions.title: Test adaptations for fork UI and CI
definitions.reason: Adapt tests for fork OAuth menu structure, Aone CI runner detection, and static imports.
tests: cd packages/cli && npx vitest run src/ui/auth/AuthDialog.test.tsx src/utils/doctorChecks.test.ts
cd packages/core && npx vitest run src/skills/skill-activation.test.ts
